title: "Limitless" Banners
description: A simple mod that removes the banner pattern limit. The new cap is at 16!
body:
# "Limitless" Banners - !["Limitless" Banners Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/"limitless"-banners)

A simple mod that removes the banner pattern limit. The new cap is at **16**, or **2147483647** from 26.1+! You can configure the 26.1+ limit in `limitless-banners.json`.

This mod will work server-side without any effect on vanilla clients joining. _Although_ if players want to take advantage of the mod they will need it on the client as well.

You can join my [discord](https://discord.com/invite/Avc2MccaqP) and bug me if you wish to see the new 26.1+ cap of 2147483647 backported!
